Chapter One · Hello

A hideaway,
by design.

Welcome to the Hamptons' premiere hideaway. We are Capri Southampton, and we invite you to get away from it all in an unforgettable setting unlike anything you've experienced before. Twenty-six club rooms surround the vibrant pool scene at our Bathing Club. Three exclusive suites are tucked into a quiet corner — privacy, with the music close at hand.

29
Rooms & Suites
1
Bathing Club
∞
Hamptons Summers
Chapter Two · Dream

Sleep, quietly.

Each room is finely appointed with luxury linens, plush bath robes, CROC premium blow dryers, and a fully stocked complimentary minibar. High-definition television, in-room safe, miniature refrigerator, complimentary Wi-Fi. Continental breakfast each morning, eight to ten, in the lobby.

The Club Room
Twenty-six rooms surround the pool. Yellow striped canopy, "ahoy" pillow, plush white robe, and a window with a view of the Bathing Club.

Detail · 04
A note from the front desk —
On Friday and Saturday nights, the pool keeps singing. Loud music carries through the property until late. Choose a Suite for quiet — or come for the noise.
"
Feel the world melt away as you soak in the sun against a backdrop of lush, tranquil gardens.
The Bathing Club · Open Daily 8 — 8
Chapter Three · Bathe

The Bathing
Club.

A refined poolside retreat known for its distinct contemporary ambiance. Chaise lounges and daybeds. Fresh cocktails. Lush hedges, intimate seating, dinner under the stars.

Dive In
Open 8 AM – 8 PM Complimentary Wi-Fi Private Events
An Aside · The Details

Small things,
handled.

The robe is embroidered. The tote is monogrammed. The toiletries are CROC. The minibar is full and complimentary. None of it is the reason you came — it's the reason you'll come back.

  • 01A "Capri" embroidered robeIn your closet, for the pool
  • 02The "Going Bathing" toteYours to keep
  • 03Fully stocked minibarComplimentary, refilled daily
  • 04Continental breakfastEight to ten, in the lobby
  • 05Luxury linens & CROC blow dryersThe good ones
Chapter Four · Feast
Arriving Summer 2026

Maison
Close.

Big news for the season ahead — Maison Close is coming to Capri Southampton. Hamptons dining reimagined for the property's most ambitious chapter yet, served on the garden patio and under the stars.

Discover Maison Close →
Chapter Five · Play

Keeping
summer sexy.

Pool parties with a resident DJ and an electric violinist. Morning yoga in the garden with Five Pillars. Immersive summer art exhibitions. Bring your dog. Bring your appetite. Bring your favorite caftan.
